positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest scene. The central composition features a group of diverse, anthropomorphic woodland creatures (foxes, raccoons, badgers) interacting in a stylized meadow. The style should be vector art illustration mixed with detailed linework, reminiscent of intricate botanical etchings but with modern, bold color blocking. Use a limited, comforting color palette: deep forest greens, mustard yellow, burnt orange, and slate blue. Strong, clean silhouettes are paramount. The scene should be highly symmetrical and designed for full-print apparel placement, using a high contrast black outline over the color fills. The overall mood is charming, adventurous, and comforting. Flat 2D aesthetic with deep depth of field achieved through overlapping layers.
negative: realistic, photorealistic, grunge, dirty, blur, noisy, low resolution, amateur, signature, watermark, text, logos, typography, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poor composition, harsh lines, bokeh, bleeding colors
